title: Krelvan Registry
description: The Krelvan capability marketplace, distributed as a Git repo. A Krelvan install fetches this index.json (raw URL) so the marketplace is live, forkable, and self-hostable. Point any install at your own fork via NEXT_PUBLIC_KRELVAN_REGISTRY_URL.

generator.description: Tool that produced this file (krelvan scripts/sync-registry.ts).

counts.description: Entry counts by kind, for a quick glance at catalog size.

capabilities.description: Every installable entry in the marketplace.

sideEffect.description: What this capability can touch. Krelvan shows this BEFORE install and pauses for approval on the dangerous classes.

category.description: e.g. Communication, Productivity, Data, Commerce, Research.

kind.description: yaml = an HTTP API wrapped no-code; mcp = a Model Context Protocol server; template = a whole installable agent; pack = a curated bundle of connectors; builtin = a core capability.

secretRefs.description: Names of the secrets/keys this entry needs (set in Krelvan → Secrets).

price.description: Display price for paid entries, e.g. '$5/mo'. Free entries omit it.

licenseUrl.description: Where to buy/get a license key (paid entries).

yaml.description: kind=yaml: the full capability definition, installed straight into Krelvan.

mcp.description: kind=mcp: the MCP connection config. Every tool the server exposes becomes a capability.

manifest.description: kind=template: the full agent manifest (nodes, edges, seed) installed as a ready-to-run agent.

capabilities.description: kind=template: the yaml capabilities this template bundles (so installing the template also installs the connectors its nodes need).

recommendedModel.description: kind=template: a model that reasons reliably for this agent.

connectors.description: kind=pack: names of the connectors this pack installs.
